sprint: Creator Signature Sky Challenge — No More Overlapping Voices on a Wrong Tap
task: A direct, same-day follow-up to the correct-tap savor-the-success fix: 'challenge screen. not quite and here some mystery friends are new voices are overlapping.' Confirmed this was exactly the disclosed, deliberately-left-out-of-scope gap that fix's own code comment already named: js/magicCardUI.js's onCardTap() wrong-tap branch fired LumoVoice.play('skyWrong') then, on a flat 1100ms setTimeout, regenerated the board and fired LumoVoice.play('skyFresh') -- but the real skyWrong clip runs 2847ms, so 'Here's a new look...' always started talking while 'Not quite...' was still mid-sentence, exactly matching the report. Fixed identically to the correct-tap case: the regenerate-and-reshuffle delay is now Math.max(1100, LumoVoice.durationMs('skyWrong') + 400) -- the same '+400ms buffer' convention js/gatewaySequence.js's playLines() already established -- instead of a guessed constant, so skyFresh never starts until skyWrong has actually finished; falls back to the original flat 1100ms if LumoVoice is unavailable. Verified via a new Playwright test instrumenting LumoVoice.play() with real timestamps (not just call order): the real gap between the skyWrong and skyFresh calls now measures ~3.25 seconds (matching 2847ms duration + 400ms buffer almost exactly), comfortably covering the full clip with zero overlap -- versus the old, confirmed-overlapping ~1.1 second gap. Full regression across the existing sky-recognition-challenge/voice suite required widening the voice test's own three wrong-tap-related fixed waits (previously assuming the old flat 1100ms) to match the new, correctly longer duration-driven delay -- the intended, disclosed consequence of this fix, not a regression; the multi-batch challenge suite (which never exercises the wrong-tap path) and the scroll/gateway-e2e suites pass unchanged. Both goldenBuild.js suites (World Builder v1 and v2, unaffected -- this fix touches zero Builder files) pass unchanged. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; confined to js/magicCardUI.js.
